About Us

Welcome to Explore Kerala for Under ₹2,000, your trusted travel guide for exploring Kerala on a budget.

Our mission is to help students, solo travelers, families, and backpackers discover beautiful destinations without spending a fortune.

We publish detailed travel guides, itineraries, transportation tips, hidden places, food recommendations, and budget planning articles based on real experiences.

Our goal is to make travel affordable, simple, and enjoyable for everyone.

Thank you for visiting our website and supporting our journey.
